rationale: Section 26.063 governs tax rate notice content when the de minimis rate exceeds the voter-approval tax rate. It references rates computed under other sections but does not itself incorporate or depend on the homestead exemption amount in §11.13(b). No textual conflict exists.
quote: The de minimis rate is the rate equal to the sum of the no-new-revenue maintenance and operations rate for (name of taxing unit), the rate that will raise $500,000, and the current debt rate for (name of taxing unit).
_note: The proposed increase to the §11.13(b) homestead exemption affects taxable value computations upstream (e.g., no-new-revenue rate under §26.012–26.013), but §26.063's notice provisions and de minimis formula ($500,000 fixed amount) are not directly dependent on the exemption amount. No amendment to §26.063 is required.
